title: Sign PDF Online — Draw Signature Offline
h1: Sign PDF Documents With Your Signature Without Uploading
description: Draw, type, or upload your signature and place it on PDFs entirely in your browser. No cloud. Perfect for users in Bucharest.

sections.title: Why Sign PDFs Locally?
sections.content: Your signature is your identity. Never upload your drawn signature or a private contract to a third-party cloud signing service.

sections.title: How to Sign a PDF in 3 Steps

steps.title: Create Your Signature
steps.description: Draw with mouse, type in signature font, or upload an image.

steps.title: Place on Document
steps.description: Drag and resize your signature to the correct position.

steps.title: Download Signed PDF
steps.description: Save your signed document immediately, no account needed.

sections.title: Private Digital Signatures for Bucharest
sections.content: Freelancers and businesses in Bucharest sign contracts, NDAs, and agreements without exposing their identity or documents to any cloud service.

sections.title: Your Signature Identity Stays Private
sections.content: Your drawn signature and signed document are processed entirely in browser memory — never stored, never transmitted.

sections.title: Sign Any Document in Under 30 Seconds
sections.content: No account, no upload, no cloud. Draw, place, and download your signed PDF in under 30 seconds.

faqs.q: How can I create my signature?
faqs.a: Draw with your mouse, type your name in a signature font, or upload an image.
Yes, place your signature on any or all pages.
Our tool applies a visual signature. For legally binding e-signatures, check your jurisdiction.
Yes, drag the corners to resize it after placing.
